summary: Remove gate-blocking raw detail and typing smells from Workbench Problem Details and job request normalization.
rationale: The WTS red-zone verification runs privacy and AI-smell gates across the stacked diff from origin/main. This cleanup keeps public Problem Details reason-code based, removes the new SourceKind cast through explicit narrowing, and keeps Workbench observability return types precise without changing runtime behavior.
deletion_targets: raw ConversationAgentError string detail in public Problem Details
new SourceKind cast in job request source normalization
new Any usage in Workbench BFF helper types
risks: Public Problem Details must keep enough reason-code information for clients without echoing raw exception strings.
Source kind normalization must preserve the exact accepted set of cts and liepin.
